event_title: [In Seattle / External Registration Required] DeepSpeed Meetup
title: DeepSpeed Meetup
description: *Note: **registration** with your full name and email i**s required** at* **[https://www.meetup.com/deepspeed-meetup-group/events/298934126/](https://www.meetup.com/deepspeed-meetup-group/events/298934126/)** or **[https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/reactor/events/21771](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/reactor/events/21771)** *to attend.* ### DeepSpeed Meetup **12 February\, 2024 \| 6:00 PM \- 8:00 PM** **Address: Redmond Reactor 3709 157th Ave NE, Redmond, WA 98052** * Format: In person (Redmond) This will be the first ever meetup for the DeepSpeed open-source project. We will have an overview of DeepSpeed, latest features and release, and deeper dive talks on particular new/important features and use cases.
